name: ax-performance-advisor-plugin
description: AX 2012 R3 performance advisor that correlates SQL Server, AOS, batch, and AX table evidence into explainable recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Correlates AX 2012 and SQL Server performance evidence into prioritized actions.
interface.longDescription: Collects and interprets SQL Server 2016, Dynamics AX 2012 R3, AOS, batch, Trace Parser, DynamicsPerf, business-calendar, and change-history evidence. Produces explainable findings with observed metrics, affected AX objects, likely causes, expected impact, change-readiness risk, validation steps, rollback notes, and before/after proof. Designed for read-only advisory workflows where changes require human approval, auditability, and ITIL/GxP-style evidence packs.
defaultPrompt: Run a daily AX 2012 and SQL Server health check from the collected evidence.
Analyze slow AX queries and map them to affected tables, batches, and wait patterns.
Create a management summary with risks, business impact, and recommended change actions.
Compare performance before and after a deployment or tuning change.
Generate an audit-ready evidence pack for the top findings.
